title: Claude FM 🎵 music for thinking and building
summary: Claude FM is a music streaming service made and curated by musicians, designed to provide background music for thinking and building. It is offered by Anthropic as a companion feature to Claude.
writeup: Anthropic introduces Claude FM, a music streaming service built and curated by musicians to serve as background music for thinking and building. The video positions it as a companion feature to Claude. The takeaway: the offering centers on human-curated music intended to accompany focused work.
